name: Chicken Curry II
recipeInstructions:
1. Note: Chicken breasts should be skinless.
2. Clean the chicken, making sure to cut off all fat.
3. Heat the oil, then brown the cumin seeds and cardamom.
4. Add the Thai chile (be careful of the fumes) and cloves.
5. Add the chopped onion, then cook until brown.
6. Add the tomatoes, ginger paste, garlic paste, and soy sauce. Cook together until all has a pasty texture.
7. Add the remaining spices and mix well.
8. Put in the chicken, and stir until coated well with the paste.
9. Cook for five to seven minutes, then add the water.
10. Cover and cook until tender, about 20 minutes.
11. Remove the chile before serving.
12. Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve with cooked rice.
